title: 菊花賞の後に・得られた言葉は

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Coming up next, an interview with the winner of
today's race! The esteemed first-place winner of
this year's Kikuka Sho is—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I still have time, right? Trainer! Get me my phone!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(This last race of the Classic Triple Crown
couldn't have gone any better! I know it... This
time...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (This time for sure!)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...
Ring, ring... Ring, ring.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hurry and pick up! I know you were watching!
Ring, ring... Click!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hello? Mother?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
What is it? What are you doing calling me at a
time like this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I... I won! I won the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that amazing?! I bet you thought it was
impossible for me! I bet you couldn't imagine
seeing me win!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: All right, all right, I get it. Calm down.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Well, I suppose you won. Good for you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! I claimed victory in a long-distance Classic race!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Looks like I'm not so talentless after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Yes, I acknowledge that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So, are you satisfied now? You've had plenty of
fun.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: It's time to come back home before you overdo it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...What?
Beep. Click.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...But why?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why is she still telling me to come home?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why can't she just say she's looking forward to
watching my next race?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And what does she mean she "acknowledges" it?
That wasn't genuine at all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Despite all my hard work and me gaining the
victory I deserve...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why won't she accept me as an Umamusume?!
Step, step, step.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Ah... There you are! Everyone's waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
You can even hear them cheering from all the way
over here!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I knew a G1 Umamusume's daughter wouldn't
disappoint!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You can tell talent runs in the family! Her mother
must be so proud!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
As expected, you really brought even more honor
to your mother's name!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is everyone waiting for me? Or for my mother's
daughter?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid I don't know what you mean...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

King Halo seems to be trying to hide it, but she
doesn't look well. Her face is pale.
choice_data_list: Should we take a little break?
Should we take a little break?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

I postpone the interviews until later to allow her
time to rest in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder if Special Week and the others are
doing interviews now instead of me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
They're the true stars, the ones who deserve the
support. I'm sure they'll announce their intentions
for the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I'm such a dummy, fiending for
everyone's approval...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why am I so shallow?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I... I feign superiority over others, but...
excellence is not something you can simply
decide to have.
The next day...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I've been thinking a lot since the
race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And I realized that... I'm King Halo. I am a first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No one can replace me. No one can hold a candle
to me. I stand at the top, alone.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why I must look down on the rest.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't seek the approval of those who are
beneath me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: What do you want to do?
What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you want to hear that answer? There
may not be any turning back for you either.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You really are my trainer, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I grant you the right to hear. And the
right to continue supporting me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are you prepared to throw away everything?

What comes out of her mouth next is an ambition
most extraordinary.
